OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the connector, used to filter the live stream events.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_ID.description: The ID of the OpenCTI live stream to connect to.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_LISTEN_DELETE.description: Whether to listen for delete events on the live stream.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_NO_DEPENDENCIES.description: Whether to ignore dependencies when processing events from the live stream.

VECTRA_AI_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the Vectra AI Platform (e.g. https://vectra.example.com).

VECTRA_AI_API_TOKEN.description: API token used to authenticate against the Vectra AI API.

VECTRA_AI_API_VERSION.description: Version of the Vectra API used to reach the threat feed endpoints.

VECTRA_AI_FEED_NAME.description: Name of the Vectra threat feed managed by this connector. It is created automatically if it does not exist yet.

VECTRA_AI_FEED_CATEGORY.description: Detection category assigned to the Vectra threat feed.

VECTRA_AI_FEED_CERTAINTY.description: Certainty assigned to indicators matched against the threat feed.

VECTRA_AI_FEED_DURATION.description: Number of days indicators remain active in the Vectra threat feed before they expire.

VECTRA_AI_SSL_VERIFY.description: Whether to verify the SSL certificate of the Vectra AI API.
